config.mcp.locked_notice: MCP è bloccato nella Zona Pericolo
config.mcp.locked_desc: Abilita 'MCP Server Connections' nella Zona Pericolo prima di configurare i server MCP.
config.mcp.disabled_desc: Abilita il toggle sopra per connettere server MCP.
config.mcp.name_exists: Un server con questo nome esiste già.
config.mcp.routing_desc: Choose which connected MCP tool AuraGo should use for built-in web search and image analysis.
config.mcp.routing_empty: No MCP routing targets are available yet. Add and enable an MCP server first.
config.mcp.mapping_web_search_desc: Uses the selected MCP tool instead of AuraGo's standard web search backend.
config.mcp.mapping_vision_desc: Uses the selected MCP tool instead of the configured Vision provider for analyze_image.
config.mcp.mapping_no_tools: No runtime tools found for this server
